decisions.rationale: Copy-paste Radix-based components, Tailwind-native, tree-shakeable, full control. Most popular for Next.js apps. Supports Tailwind v4.
Replace date pickers, selects, plus create reusable Input, Label, Button, Textarea components. All 13+ form files refactored to use the new primitives.

decisions.decision: Add searchable combobox for categories and accounts
decisions.rationale: Categories and accounts can grow large. Combobox with type-to-filter improves UX significantly over plain <select>.
Replaces 6 native <input type=date> with consistent, accessible date picker. Better mobile UX and visual consistency.
Project uses Tailwind v4 with @theme inline in globals.css. No tailwind.config.ts. shadcn/ui init must use v4-compatible setup with CSS variables.

constraints: Tailwind CSS v4 (CSS-first config, no tailwind.config.ts)
All forms use Next.js Server Actions via useActionState — no react-hook-form
Keep server action form submission pattern (FormData-based)
Existing warm color theme: terracotta (blue-600 = #C4663A), highland green (emerald-600 = #2D8659)
DM Sans is the primary font
Must preserve existing ConfirmDialog and QuickEntrySheet (recently shipped in progressive-enhancement)
